name: WAV PCM to Raw PCM
summary: Zero-dependency extraction and canonicalization of RIFF/WAVE integer PCM as parameterized raw PCM.

scope: Arbitrary chunk order and multiple frame-aligned data chunks
Signed or unsigned, little-endian or big-endian raw output

guarantees: Sample values, frames and channel order are preserved
Raw interpretation parameters are returned in Report
Multiple data chunks concatenate in source order
tradeoffs: Container structure and metadata are discarded by definition

properties: Raw output length equals complete WAVE data frames
Signedness rebasing and endian reversal preserve integer levels
regression: Unsigned WAVE 8-bit becomes signed raw by default
fuzz: Planned: RIFF graph, fmt, alignment and fragmented-reader campaigns
benchmarks: Planned: widths, channels and chunk-layout corpus

limits: fmt chunks are bounded to 4096 bytes
channels default to a maximum of 256
all offsets and sizes are checked
known_risks: Seek or output I/O errors may occur after partial raw output
